docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2020 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2020 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO OCT-22-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GARY L. NEATHERLIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GETAROUND IS NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $981.95 FILED BY NEATHERLIN, GARY L AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEATHERLIN, GARY L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GETAROUND $981.95 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,071.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00 - SERVED JUL-21-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF GARY L. NEATHERLIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GETAROUND IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
